title: MCP server compatibility contract — machine-testable subset (CR-06)
description: Transcribes docs/reference/mcp-server-compatibility-contract.md sec 2 into schema form. Covers ONLY the shape of the 'initialize' and 'tools/list' JSON-RPC responses — every other part of the contract (identity headers, credential injection, error semantics) is not (yet) machine-testable and is out of scope for this schema. See contract_check.py for how this is used.

capabilities.description: Server capability flags — shape is intentionally open (MCP defines an extensible set).

inputSchema.description: A JSON Schema object describing the tool's call arguments — MCP does not further constrain its shape beyond 'must be an object'.
